summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TILAWA Islamic EdTech Quran learning platform. Backend API testing achieved 100% success rate (14/14 tests passed). Frontend testing confirmed all major features working correctly including 114 surah display, mushaf reader, audio controls, search functionality, tajweed practice with mocked sessions, and bookmarks.

design_issues.issue: HTML validation warning: <span> cannot be child of <option> causing hydration warning

passed_tests: GET /api/surahs returns 114 surahs with Arabic names and metadata
GET /api/surahs/1/verses returns verses with text_uthmani, words, translation_en
POST /api/bookmarks creates bookmark, GET /api/bookmarks retrieves it, DELETE /api/bookmarks/{id} removes it
POST /api/tajweed/sessions returns mock session with word_scores
Home page (/) shows 114 surah cards in grid layout
Mushaf reader (/mushaf/1) displays Al-Fatihah verses with Arabic text and English translation
Audio bar appears at bottom with play, prev, next controls when on mushaf reader
Search page (/search) shows search input and returns results when typing
Tajweed hub (/tajweed) shows 7 tajweed rules grid and surah selector
Tajweed session (/tajweed/session/1:1) shows verse, recording button, and mock results with 4 word scores
Navigation between all pages works correctly
Sidebar navigation with surah list functions properly
